query:
UPDATE users
            SET
                username = $1,
                name = $2,
                status = $3,
                role = $4,
                password_hash = $5,
                global_role = $6,
                email_verified_at = $7,
                institution_id = $8,
                terms_accepted_at = $9,
                terms_version = $10,
                updated_at = NOW()
            WHERE id = $11
